query.text: declare @unit varchar(128), @siteID varchar(128) select @siteID = '%#10$' + @ma_kho + '%#20$' + @ma_khon + '%', @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end &FilterInitialize;&CheckRelativeProcess; exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding 'PXI', 'c65$000000', 'm65$', 'i65$', 'ngay_ct', 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', '000000', @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @siteID, '', 'stt_rec', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,status', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,b.status,b.statusname%l u0%l', 'a left join dmttct b on a.status = b.status where b.ma_ct = ''PXI''', 'ngay_ct, so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, '', '', '1', '0', @unit, 0, 1, default, default, default, default, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
